global_description: A small, slender bird with a streamlined body and pointed wings. It has a brown upper body and a white underbody with a distinctive brown band across the chest. The bird's plumage is smooth and sleek, aiding in its agile flight.
discriminative_attributes: White underbody with brown chest band

part_details.head: Small, rounded, brown with a short, pointed beak.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, pointed, brown on top.
part_details.chest: White with a distinct brown band.

spatial_relations: The brown chest band is positioned horizontally across the white underbody.
The pointed wings extend laterally from the streamlined body.
The short forked tail is at the rear of the body.
